extraction.one_line_summary: THOMAS Geraint won a 25.6km ITT by 1:12 over HIGUITA Sergio, coming within 3 seconds of EVENEPOEL's stage win in the final 25 meters.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL destroyed second half of ITT despite KÜNG being 2sec faster at intermediate, suggesting tactical pacing mastery.
THOMAS came within 3sec of stage win while prioritizing GC gap over HIGUITA, showing calculated time trial execution.
MARTÍNEZ testing prototype disc brake bike in competitive ITT signals equipment strategy shift ahead of Tour de France.
KÜNG climbing better than ever yet still 10sec down on stage, confirming EVENEPOEL's superiority in mixed-terrain ITTs.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: won stage at 54kph average with superior second-half pacing despite KÜNG being faster at intermediate check
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: won overall by 1:12, nearly caught EVENEPOEL in final meters showing peak form at 36 years old
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: climbed better than ever but still seeking first 2022 win, moved into top five GC
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: held second overall despite being slower ITT specialist, riding combatively to limit losses
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: solid ITT secured third overall for second consecutive year, committed to returning for another attempt
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: strong ITT performance on new equipment ahead of Tour de France signals rising form
rider_signals.VAN WILDER Ilan: negative: disastrous crash near finish forced DNF, requiring medical attention
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: negative: mechanical issue disrupted ITT while riding great race as part of understaffed two-man team
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: won points jersey by comfortable margin
